# yii3-recaptcha

Google reCAPTCHA v2 and v3 widget and validator for Yii3.

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-recaptcha
```

## Rules

- `declare(strict_types=1)` in every file.
- `final readonly class` by default. `final class` only when clone-based immutability is needed.
- `#[\Override]` on every interface/parent method implementation.
- No `@psalm-suppress` — fix the root cause.
- Secret keys must never appear in client-side output.

## API reference

### RecaptchaV2 (widget)

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Recaptcha\RecaptchaV2;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Recaptcha\RecaptchaV2Theme;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Recaptcha\RecaptchaV2Type;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Recaptcha\RecaptchaV2Size;

$html = RecaptchaV2::widget()
    ->withSiteKey('site-key')
    ->withId('login-captcha') // optional; auto-generated unique id if omitted
    ->withTheme(RecaptchaV2Theme::Dark)
    ->withType(RecaptchaV2Type::Image)
    ->withSize(RecaptchaV2Size::Normal)
    ->withCallback('onSuccess')
    ->withExpiredCallback('onExpired')
    ->withErrorCallback('onError')
    ->withJsApiUrl('https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api.js')
    ->render();
```

### RecaptchaV3 (widget)

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Recaptcha\RecaptchaV3;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Recaptcha\RecaptchaV3Badge;

$html = RecaptchaV3::widget()
    ->withSiteKey('site-key')
    ->withAction('login')                  // grecaptcha.execute action; default 'submit'
    ->withFieldName('recaptchaToken')      // hidden input name; default 'g-recaptcha-response'
    ->withFieldId('rc3')                   // optional; auto-generated unique id if omitted
    ->withFormId('login-form')             // optional; enables invisible-submit binding
    ->withBadge(RecaptchaV3Badge::Hidden)  // BottomRight (default) | BottomLeft | Hidden (+legal notice)
    ->render();
// Renders: api.js?render=site-key script + hidden input + inline script.
// Without withFormId(): token is filled on grecaptcha.ready().
// With withFormId(): submit is intercepted, token executed+filled, then form submitted.
// All embedded values are JSON-encoded with XSS-safe flags.
```

### RecaptchaConfig

```php
$config = new RecaptchaConfig(
    siteKeyV2: 'v2-key',
    secretV2: 'v2-secret',
    siteKeyV3: 'v3-key',
    secretV3: 'v3-secret',
    verifyUrl: 'https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api/siteverify',
    sendRemoteIp: false,
);
```

### RecaptchaClient

```php
$client = new RecaptchaClient(config: $config, httpClient: $http, requestFactory: $psr17, streamFactory: $psr17);

$result = $client->verify(token: 'token', clientIp: '1.2.3.4');           // uses secretV2
$result = $client->verifyV3(token: 'token', clientIp: '1.2.3.4');         // uses secretV3
$result = $client->verifyWithSecret(token: 'token', secret: 'custom');    // uses custom secret
```

In the validator pipeline handlers resolve `clientIp` from the current request
via `yiisoft/request-provider` (`RequestProviderInterface`, `REMOTE_ADDR`).

### VerificationResult

```php
final readonly class VerificationResult
{
    public bool $success;
    public array $errorCodes;   // string[]
    public ?float $score;       // v3 only
    public ?string $action;     // v3 only
    public ?string $hostname;
    public ?string $challengeTs;
}
```

### RecaptchaV2Rule / RecaptchaV2RuleHandler

```php
#[RecaptchaV2Rule(message: 'Captcha failed', sendRemoteIp: true)]
public string $gRecaptchaResponse = '';
```

### RecaptchaV3Rule / RecaptchaV3RuleHandler

```php
#[RecaptchaV3Rule(threshold: 0.5, action: 'login', scoreTooLowMessage: 'Low score')]
public string $recaptchaToken = '';
```

v3 handler logic: `success && score >= threshold && (action === null || action === response.action)`.

### Enums

```php
enum RecaptchaV2Theme: string { case Light = 'light'; case Dark = 'dark'; }
enum RecaptchaV2Type: string  { case Image = 'image'; case Audio = 'audio'; }
enum RecaptchaV2Size: string  { case Normal = 'normal'; case Compact = 'compact'; case Invisible = 'invisible'; }
```

### DI config

```php
// config/params.php
return [
    'rasuvaeff/yii3-recaptcha' => [
        'siteKeyV2' => '',
        'secretV2' => '',
        'siteKeyV3' => '',
        'secretV3' => '',
        'translation.category' => 'yii3-recaptcha',
    ],
];
```
